Package tower

package tower
Provides the core logic and specialized implementations for defensive structures. * This package contains the hierarchical structure of the tower system, ranging from basic elemental units to advanced fusion structures. It manages target acquisition algorithms, combat state updates, and the integration of visual effects. * The system is designed around two main pillars: 1. Inheritance: Utilizing a base Tower class and AOETower specialization to standardize behaviors like cooldowns, stunning, and area damage. 2. Fusion Logic: Implementing the Mergeable interface to allow dynamic creation of hybrid towers, combining different elemental properties into elite units.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AOETower
    An abstract specialization of Tower designed for Area of Effect (AoE) attacks.
    GasTower
    Represents a specific implementation of an AOETower that utilizes toxic gas to damage enemies.
    GlacierTower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines superior range with cryogenic status effects.
    IceTower
    A specialized Tower that focuses on crowd control by firing ice-based projectiles.
    MistTower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) damage with debilitating cold effects.
    PlasmaTower
    An elite fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) capabilities with high-frequency attacks.
    RangeTower
    A specialized Tower characterized by its superior engagement distance and versatile targeting.
    SuperconductTower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines rapid-fire electrical frequency with cryogenic effects.
    TeslaTower
    An elite fusion tower that combines exceptional engagement range with extreme firing velocity.
    TornadoTower
    An advanced fusion tower that combines Area-of-Effect (AoE) damage with expanded environmental reach.
    Tower
    Represents the skeletal implementation of a defensive structure within the game.
    ZapTower
    A specialized Tower designed for high-frequency electrical attacks.
